introSection: Wild Mouse was a hybrid wild mouse roller coaster built by Butlin's (under license from B. A. Schiff & Associates) previously located at Butlin's Minehead in Minehead, Somerset, England, UK.
fullText: Wild Mouse was a hybrid wild mouse roller coaster built by Butlin's (under license from B. A. Schiff & Associates) previously located at Butlin's Minehead in Minehead, Somerset, England, UK.
